title: CEFR Speaking Mock Test - Set A
description: Rasmiy CEFR speaking imtihon formatiga to'liq moslashtirilgan 4 qismli mock testi.

part_1_1.title: Part 1.1 - Personal Questions (Shaxsiy savollar)
part_1_1.instructionsUz: Sizga ketma-ket 3 ta shaxsiy savol beriladi. Har bir savol uchun 15 soniya tayyorgarlik va 45 soniya gapirish vaqti ajratiladi.

questions.text: What do you enjoy most about your studies or job, and why?
How important is it for people to balance work and free time in modern life?
Where do you see yourself living and working in five years' time?

part_1_2.title: Part 1.2 - Picture Comparison (Rasmlar solishtirish)
part_1_2.instructionsUz: Ushbu ikkita rasmni solishtiring, ulardagi farqlarni va odamlar nima sababdan bu mashg'ulotlarni tanlaganliklarini taxmin qilib gapiring. Tayyorgarlik uchun 60 soniya, gapirish uchun 90 soniya beriladi.
part_1_2.image1Desc: Students studying together in a library/group.
part_1_2.image2Desc: A student studying alone on a laptop in a quiet environment.

part_2.title: Part 2 - Long Speaking (Mavzu taqdimoti)
part_2.instructionsUz: Berilgan rasm va 3 ta yo'naltiruvchi savol asosida o'z fikringizni to'liq bayon eting. Tayyorgarlik uchun 60 soniya (eslatmalar yozib olishingiz mumkin) va gapirish uchun 120 soniya ajratiladi.
guidingQuestions: Why has plastic pollution become a global emergency in recent decades?
What are the direct consequences of this pollution on wildlife and human health?
What steps can individuals and governments take to mitigate this threat?

part_3.title: Part 3 - Debate (Munozara)
part_3.instructionsUz: Berilgan tezis yuzasidan munozara qiling. Unda qo'llab-quvvatlovchi (FOR) va qarshi bo'lgan (AGAINST) nuqtai nazarlarni ochib berishingiz kerak. Tayyorgarlik uchun 90 soniya, gapirish uchun 120 soniya beriladi.
part_3.statement: Online learning will completely replace traditional schools and universities in the future.
pointsFor: Ultimate flexibility, self-paced learning, and study from anywhere.
Access to global top-tier educators and cost-efficiency.
pointsAgainst: Lack of physical social interactions and peer communication.
Practical fields (medicine, engineering) require hands-on physical labs.
